## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist
- [ ] API builds: `cd api && mvn -B clean package`
- [ ] Classifier compiles: `cd classifier && python -m py_compile main.py`
- [ ] Ran it locally (`docker compose up --build`) and verified the change
- [ ] Updated docs / eval set if behavior changed
- [ ] No secrets committed

## Notes for reviewers
Anything worth calling out (trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots).
